mock_email_r25.body: Based on your learning history, we recommend courses on Docker, Kubernetes, and Advanced Python patterns. Discount code inside.

mock_email_n1.subject: Don’t overuse LLMs 🙅, small AI models gain traction 🐜
mock_email_n1.body: A small, cost-effective LLM was implemented to prune retrieved context chunks for question-answering systems in order to improve efficiency, successfully discarding 68% of unnecessary chunks while maintaining 96% recall.

mock_email_n2.subject: ☕ Kids vehicle, SpaceX public trading
mock_email_n2.body: Trump Accounts have rolled out their new investment tools for kids. Plus, the tech-heavy index Nasdaq is fast-tracking SpaceX's inclusion to expose the company to new passive investors.

mock_email_n3.subject: FIFA is a cautionary tale for Trump
mock_email_n3.body: FIFA's messy decision to reverse a red card against the American star Folarin Balogun shows what happens when an institution forfeits the benefit of the doubt. It's a warning for the Trump administration.

mock_email_n4.subject: 🟥 Axios PM: Red card, red line
mock_email_n4.body: Graham Platner, Maine's Democratic Senate nominee, said this afternoon he's taking time to reconsider his next steps after a woman accused him of sexually assaulting her in 2021. Politico reported today.

mock_email_n5.subject: Why we wake up at 4 AM to write this
mock_email_n5.body: The story behind 1440, and why it matters to you. 1440 started because we had the same frustration: staying informed meant bouncing between 15 or 20 different sites every morning. We wanted one place, five minutes.

mock_email_n6.subject: Seedance 2.5 🎥, guide to Fable ✨, OpenAI preps GPT-5.6 🚀
mock_email_n6.body: ByteDance is rumored to be launching its Dreamina Seedance 2.5 model on July 9. Plus, a beginner's guide to using Fable for storytelling and news about OpenAI prepping GPT-5.6 release.

mock_email_r24.body: Discover new music released by artists you follow on Spotify. Your customized Release Radar playlist is waiting.

mock_email_n7.subject: Chrome Extension Rules Tighten 🧩, Meta Eyes AI Cloud ☁️
mock_email_n7.body: Google announces strict security requirements for extensions to prevent user tracking. Meta plans huge cloud servers to host AI models for developers. Enterprise-first security becomes standard.

mock_email_n8.subject: Amazon's Starlink rival 🛰️, Nvidia revenue share 💰
mock_email_n8.body: Amazon launches test satellites for Project Kuiper to compete with SpaceX Starlink. Nvidia introduces new revenue share model for developers using its local micro-nodes. Agentic autonomy reaches new levels.

mock_email_n9.subject: ☕ Markets dip as Fed holds interest rates steady
mock_email_n9.body: The Federal Reserve kept key interest rates unchanged in its recent session. Tech stocks dip as investors react to inflation index. Apple Vision Pro sales exceed expectation in early markets.

mock_email_n10.subject: ⚡ Axios AM: Vance's hot summer
mock_email_n10.body: Plus: World Cup updates. Senator Graham Platner faces new allegations that threaten his campaign in Maine. Democrats scramble to find a replacement candidate before the ballot deadline.

mock_email_n11.subject: Lizzo and Pop Culture's Flops
mock_email_n11.body: How Lizzo became one of pop culture's great flops. Spencer Kornhaber analyzes the marketing campaigns emphasizing unpopularity. Plus: Sony's digital-only console future by 2028.

mock_email_n12.subject: Printing press and 1440 minutes
mock_email_n12.body: The printing press was invented around the year 1440, making knowledge accessible to everyone. There are also 1,440 minutes in every single day. We want to help you make each one count. No algorithms.

mock_email_n13.subject: State of coding agents 🧑‍💻, running LLMs locally
mock_email_n13.body: Coding agents are evolving rapidly with multi-file edit capabilities. Running LLMs locally becomes practical with Bun and Llama.cpp. And an expert says: just learn SQL, it's still the best query language.

mock_email_n14.subject: ☕ Apple Vision Pro sales exceed expectations
mock_email_n14.body: Vision Pro sales hit record highs in key markets. Meta builds low-cost headsets in response. Plus: quick take on the SEC's new crypto regulation framework updates released this Friday.

mock_email_n15.subject: Axios Finish Line: Therapy's new lens
mock_email_n15.body: Axios Finish Line looks at the rise of virtual reality therapy. Virtual headsets allow patients to experience simulated environments safely to treat phobias. Experts say the new lens shows promise.

mock_email_n16.subject: The 'consumer socialism' trap
mock_email_n16.body: How subscription models lock users in. The 'consumer socialism' trap explores the shift from owning physical products to renting access indefinitely, and what this implies for digital property rights.
